alt: Cedar waxwing stripping a crab apple
remark: The mask makes every waxwing look like it knows something you don't. This one did: the fruit two branches over was better.

behavior: Wings spread to the sea wind
remark: An ID argued over lunch and settled by gular skin. The best souvenir from that trip weighs nothing.

alt: Great blue heron standing still in shallow water
remark: Forty minutes without moving, then one strike. Herons understand something about attention that I keep trying to learn.
